notes: Blind benchmark. Validator (node skills/wardley-map/scripts/validate_owm.mjs) could not be executed in sandbox (permission-denied for non-allowlisted node paths). Validation performed by manual edge trace against the three rules the script enforces; 6 initial visibility violations were found and fixed iteratively. Map has 45 declared nodes (3 anchors + 42 components) and 84 edges; manual pass records no remaining violations. Layout-check equivalents also performed manually.
